overrides.text: Authentication / users / authorization are out of scope
overrides.justification: next-auth was already present in the original package.json. This task only upgraded lodash version from 4.17.20 to 4.18.1. No authentication-related changes were made.

overrides.text: persistence MUST be the in-memory store, not a database
overrides.justification: @prisma/client was already present in the original package.json. This task only upgraded lodash version from 4.17.20 to 4.18.1. No database or persistence changes were made.

overrides.text: The note text field MUST be named 'body', not 'content', in both the request and response JSON
overrides.justification: This task only upgraded lodash version and does not involve any API routes or JSON field names. The 'body' field constraint does not apply to a dependency upgrade task.
